title: Run the candidate-to-production promotion workflow
description: A staged path from logged experiment to gated production rollout with checks at each transition.
body: Use when moving a model from experiment to production. Do not skip stages under deadline pressure — each transition catches a distinct failure class. Actions: log the experiment with full metadata, register the best candidate, run the eval gate, deploy to staging, shadow live traffic, then canary with guardrails. Validation signals include a promotion record showing every gate passed and a staging trace matching production shapes. Risk boundary: jumping straight to production skips regression and shadow checks; if a stage is bypassed, record the exception and require human approval to proceed.
